body_txt: The opposite of Names to Run Away from Really Fast , this is for clearly heroic sounding names. Likely examples include religious references, light, and positive adjectives. Truth in Television as virtues are popular baby names. See also: Meaningful Name , Steven Ulysses Perhero , Ironic Name , Fluffy the Terrible , Non-Indicative Name . By contrast, such tropes as Honest John's Dealership , Ironic Name , Peace & Love Incorporated , and Fluffy the Terrible show that this concept can be invoked by less than trustworthy characters.
